sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set BusCat = '98' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '99'
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,CC,BusCat,TP,TTY,Amt1) (Select KeyID,Co,GL,CC,BusCat,TP,TTY,round(sum(Amt1),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,GL,CC,BusCat,TP,TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Ledger is not NULL)
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,CC,BusCat,TP,TTY,Amt1) (Select '[batchID]-data2',Co,GL,CC,BusCat,TP,TTY,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,CC,BusCat,Amt1) (Select KeyID,Co,'6997000',CC,'98',round(sum(Amt1),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or TTY is not NULL)
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,CC,BusCat,Amt1,Flex1) (Select KeyID,Co,GL,substring(CC,1,3) + 'U' + substring(CC,5,6),BusCat,round(-Amt1,2),CC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Txt = 'CCtr reclass from C/H to U for GAAP-Stat true-up' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'

Update x set CC = y.CCTR from TransX x inner join (Select t.CC,c3.CCTR from TransX t left join CCtrs c1 on t.CC = c1.CCTR and c1.BlockAct <> 'X' and t.Flex1 is not NULL inner join CCtrs c2 on t.Flex1 = c2.CCTR left join (Select Co,Hierarchy,max(CCTR) as CCTR from CCtrs where Cat in ('U','S','A') and BlockAct <> 'X' group by Co,Hierarchy) c3 on t.Co = c3.Co and c2.Hierarchy = c3.Hierarchy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and c1.CCTR is NULL and c3.CCTR is not NULL) y on x.CC = y.CC where KeyID = '[batchID]'
